programme.title: BKFC 34
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Tom Shoaff for BKFC lightweight title, and David Mundell vs. Francesco Ricci for vacant BKFC middleweight title from Hollywood, Florida. From Dec. 3, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 44
programme.desc: Number one-rated Kai Stewart takes on number two-rated Louie Lopez for the BKFC featherweight championship belt in Great Falls, Montana on June 9.

programme.title: BKFC 45: Palomino vs. Lilley
programme.desc: Luis Palomino vs. James Lilley, lightweight championship bout. From Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with teams of male and female fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Logan Storley vs. Brennan Ward, welterweight bout; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Steve Mowry, heavyweight bout; Dalton Rosta vs. Aaron Jeffery, middleweight bout; Sidney Outlaw vs. Islam Mamedov, lightweight bout. From Aug. 11, 2023 in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Johnny Eblen vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight championship bout; Aaron Pico vs. Pedro Carvalho, featherweights; Mads Burnell vs. Daniel Weichel, featherweights. From Sept. 23, 2023 in Dublin.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: The stand-up game kicks off the final episode of the season, and a poker legend pays the penalty to the table; Eric Hicks rides a heater of hot hands and hot plays as he continues to drag pots, while Matt Berkey plays a big one against Matt Steinberg.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Antonio Esfandiari, Andrew Sasson, Brandon Steven, Alex Dombroff, John Morgan and Jennifer Tilly play $100/$200 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Antonio Esfandiari, Andrew Sasson, Brandon Steven, Alex Dombroff, John Morgan and Jennifer Tilly play $100/$200 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: TBL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Replays and highlights of events from past Team Boxing League seasons.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.desc: Main event: Marcirley Alves defeats Leandro Higo.

programme.title: Bellator 300
programme.desc: From Oct. 7, 2023. Features three title fights from some of Bellator's most recognizable champions in MMA action. From San Diego.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Yaroslav Amosov vs. Jason Jackson, welterweight title bout. From Nov. 17, 2023 at Wintrust Arena in Chicago.

BKFC 47
programme.desc: From July 14, 2023. Features David Mundell vs. Mike Richman for BKFC middleweight title, plus Josh Dyer vs. Jared Warren for interim BKFC light heavyweight title from Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 48
programme.desc: From Aug. 11, 2023. Features John Dodson vs. JR Ridge for inaugural BKFC flyweight title, plus Keith Richardson vs. Derek Perez in bare-knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Fabian Edwards defeats Impa Kasanganay.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Corey Anderson vs. Karl Moore from Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Ramazan Kuramagomedov vs. Jason Jackson from Ireland.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Features Tom Lafferty vs. Scott McHugh for BKB bantamweight championship.

programme.desc: BKFC title bouts featuring Joey Beltran vs. Sam Shewmaker, Hector Lombard vs. Joe Riggs, Luis Palomino vs. Tyler Goodjohn, and Thiago Alves vs. Ulysses Diaz in bare knuckle boxing action from Miami, Florida. From June 26, 2021.
